---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the ledger or UI
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Submit form with '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen (e.g., Stock should have been deducted using FEFO, but it deducted from the wrong batch).

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Desktop (please complete the following information):
 - OS: [e.g. Windows, macOS]
 - Browser [e.g. chrome, safari]
 - Version [e.g. 22]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., Database state, error logs from the console, or Supabase edge function logs).
